stages.concept:
# Unit 111: the + 최상급 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **최상급**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> She is **the tallest** girl in her class.
> 그녀는 반에서 키가 가장 큰 소녀이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **the + 최상급 + in/of** — ~중에서 가장 …한

> He is **the smartest** student **in** the school.
> 그는 학교에서 가장 똑똑한 학생이다.

> This is **the most beautiful** place **in** the world.
> 여기는 세계에서 가장 아름다운 곳이다.

> She is **the best** singer **of** all.
> 그녀는 모든 사람 중에서 최고의 가수이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 최상급 만드는 법:

| 규칙 | 예시 |
|------|------|
| 짧은 단어: the + ~est | tall → the tallest, fast → the fastest |
| 긴 단어: the most + 원급 | beautiful → the most beautiful |
| 불규칙 | good → the best, bad → the worst, many/much → the most |

👩‍🏫 선생님: **in** — 장소/범위와 함께 (in the class, in the world)
**of** — 그룹/전체와 함께 (of all, of the three)

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르세요.**
"He is the tallest ____ the five boys."
1. in
2. on
3. of ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 다섯 명의 소년들이라는 특정한 구성원이나 그룹 중에서는 전치사 of를 써야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 최상급은 the + ~est 또는 the most ~! in은 장소/범위, of는 그룹과 쓰는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 111: the+최상급 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He is (     ) boy in our class.
> **정답** the tallest

---

**02.** She is ? student in the school.
> **정답** the smartest

---

**03.** This is ? building in the city.
> **정답** the tallest

---

**04.** He runs ? in our team.
> **정답** the fastest

---

**05.** It was ? day of the year.
> **정답** the hottest

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is smartest student in our class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** smartest → the smartest

---

**07.** He is the most tall boy in the school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** most tall → tallest

---

**08.** This is the most good movie I've seen.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** most good → best

---

**09.** She is the beautifulest girl in the class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** beautifulest → most beautiful

---

**10.** He is the most fast runner in our team.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** most fast → fastest

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 반에서 가장 키가 큰 소년이다.
He is boy in our class.
> **정답** the tallest

---

**12.** 이것은 세계에서 가장 큰 건물이다.
This is building in the world.
> **정답** the biggest (the largest)

---

**13.** 그녀는 학교에서 가장 인기 있는 학생이다.
She is student in the school.
> **정답** the most popular

---

**14.** 이것은 내가 읽은 책 중에 가장 좋은 것이다.
This is book I've read.
> **정답** the best

---

**15.** 겨울은 1년 중 가장 추운 계절이다.
Winter is season of the year.
> **정답** the coldest

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 반에서 가장 똑똑하다.
She the is smartest in our class
> **정답** She / is / the / smartest / in / our / class

---

**17.** 이것은 가장 재미있는 영화이다.
This the is most interesting movie
> **정답** This / is / the / most / interesting / movie

---

**18.** 그는 팀에서 가장 빠르다.
He the is fastest on the team
> **정답** He / is / the / fastest / on / the / team

---

**19.** 이것은 내가 먹어본 중에 가장 맛있는 케이크이다.
This the is best cake I've ever eaten
> **정답** This / is / the / best / cake / I've / ever / eaten

---

**20.** 여름은 1년 중 가장 더운 계절이다.
Summer the is hottest season of the year
> **정답** Summer / is / the / hottest / season / of / the / year
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 111: the+최상급 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My room is ________________ in the house.
I usually study in the living room.
But living room is ______________ place in the
house.
darkest - noisiest
the most darkest - the most noisiest
the darker - the noisier
the darkest - the noisiest
> **정답** the darkest - the noisiest

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom's Diner is ____________ restaurant in my town.
________________ thing I have is Apple Watch.
better - The most valuable
best - most valuable
the best - most valuable
the best - The most valuable
> **정답** the best - The most valuable

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Quebec is _________________ city in Canada.
It is not ________________ city in Canada.
the most attractive - the most large
most attractive - largest
the most attractive - the largest
the attractivest - the largest
> **정답** the most attractive - the largest

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The most pretty place in Korea is Jeju island.
The earliest time for the train to Busan is at 5
a.m.
The Nile River is the longest river in the world.
This sofa is the most comfortable spot in the
livingroom.
> **정답** The most pretty place in Korea is Jeju island.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Among these dishes, the main dish was the
most delicious.
Amy is the kindest student in her class.
My parents' room is the largest in the house.
This TV show is most entertaining to me.
> **정답** This TV show is most entertaining to me.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
The boy is the most __________________ person I've
ever met.
honest
handsome
talkative
polite
> **정답** polite

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
The girl is the _________est person I've ever met.
great
popular
quiet
tall
> **정답** popular

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy looks the happyest among these three
people.
Tom is the most tallest student in his class.
The teacher's explanation is the clearest to
me.
The most large city in Korea is Seoul.
> **정답** The teacher's explanation is the clearest to me.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The soldier is the most bravest of all.
Tom drives the most slowly on a rainy day.
Which is the larger country in the world?
Amy is the most clever kid in the math class.
> **정답** Tom drives the most slowly on a rainy day.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 선수는 그의 팀에서 가장 재능있는 선수이다.
The player is the most talented player on his
team.
The player is most talented player on his
team.
The player is the more talented player on his
team.
The player is the talentedest player on his
team.
> **정답** The player is the most talented player on his team.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 다섯 명 중 가장 활동적인 친구이다.
Amy is the most active friend of five.
Amy is the activest friend of five.
Amy is the more active friend of five.
Amy is the most activest friend of five.
> **정답** Amy is the most active friend of five.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그것은 내가 들었던 것 중에 가장 충격적인 소식이었다.
It was the most shocking news I have ever
heard.
It was most shocking news I have ever heard.
It was the more shocking news I have ever
heard.
It was the most shockingest news I have ever
heard.
> **정답** It was the most shocking news I have ever heard.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Science is the most interesting subject to me.
I took the quickest road to get here.
The largest room in this house is my sister's.
Amy is known to be smartest student in the
school.
> **정답** Amy is known to be smartest student in the school.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy visited the most famous
hospital.
My little sister likes me the best.
His essay was most clear to read and
understand.
That was the worst idea he has ever said.
> **정답** His essay was most clear to read and understand.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My father 's dream is to
drive fastest car in the world.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** fastest → the fastest

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Among us, Tom speaks English
the most well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** most well. → best

---

**17.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
이 음악축제는 한국에서 가장 인기 있는 축제이다.
This music festival is
_________________________________________.
the most popular festival in Korea
the popularest festival in Korea
most popular festival in Korea
the most popular festival of Korea
> **정답** the most popular festival in Korea

---

**18.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
가장 일찍 일어나는 새가 벌레를 잡는다.
_______________________________ catches the
worm.
The earliest bird
The earlier bird
The most early bird
More early bird
> **정답** The earliest bird

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My family decided to adopt a dog. We went to an
animal shelter. There were many dogs. I liked
the most cutest one. But, my
mom chose the smallest dog. We brought
the dog home and provided
the most cozy home.
• cozy 편안한, 아늑한
> **정답** the cutest, the smallest, the coziest

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
I have exams tomorrow. I feel English is
the most difficult subject of all
the subjects. Therefore, I study English
the hardest . I don't have to study math
much, because it is easiest one for me.
If I pass all the exams, my mom will buy me the
latest cell phone. And she will also take me to
the famousest restaurant in
the town.
• therefore 그러므로
> **정답** the most difficult, the hardest, the easiest, the most famous
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 111 the+최상급중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 최상급을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
에베레스트산은 세계에서 가장 높은 산이다.
힌트 (     ) high, mountain
Mt. Everest is  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the world.
정답 the, highest, mountain

---

**02.** 최상급을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
민지는 우리들 중 가장 적은 실수를 한다.
힌트 (     ) few, mistakes
Lisa makes  (     )   (     )   (     )  among us.
정답 the, fewest, mistakes

---

**03.** 최상급을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
한국에서 가장 인기있는 스포츠는 축구이다.
힌트 (     ) popular, sport
  (     )   (     )   (     )  in Korea is soccer.
정답 The, most, popular, sport

---

**04.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (최상급 표현)
Junghyun chose expensivest outfit in the store.
→ Junghyun chose
.
정답 the most expensive outfit in the store

---

**05.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (최상급 표현)
The most latest news was about a man living in
the forest.
→  (     )  was about a man living in
the forest.
정답 The latest news

---

**06.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오. (최상급 표현)
I like the book because it is written by famousest
writer in America.
→ I like the book because it is written by
.
정답 the most famous writer in America

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (최상급을 사용할 것)
bad, worker
A: Why did the boss fire the worker?
B: It is because he was  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the
company.
• fire 해고시키다
정답 the, worst, worker

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (최상급을 사용할 것)
good, choice
A: Do you like your mother's pick?
B: Yes, I think it's  (     )   (     )   (     )  she has ever
made.
정답 the, best, choice

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (최상급을 사용할 것)
talkative, person
A: Does Kathy talk a lot?
B: Yes, she is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the
class.
• talkative 수다스러운
정답 the, most, talkative, person

---

**10.** 주어진 형용사를 알맞은 최상급으로 고쳐 다음 글을
완성하시오.
[quiet / large / young / playful]
I have two older brothers and one older sister. I
am  (     )   (     )  of all. Tom is the oldest, so his
room is  (     )   (     ) . My sister's name is Amy.
She likes to play outside. She is  (     )  
 child. I am very shy and don't talk a lot. I
am  (     )   (     )  one.
정답 the, youngest, the, largest, the, most, playful, the,
quietest

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 111: the+최상급 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My room is ________________ in the house.
I usually study in the kitchen.
But the kitchen is ______________ place in the house.
darkest - noisiest the most darkest - the most noisiest the darker - the noisier the darkest - the noisiest
> 정답: the darkest - the noisiest

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom's Café is ____________ restaurant in my town.
________________ thing I have is my laptop.
better - The most valuable best - most valuable the best - most valuable the best - The most valuable
> 정답: the best - The most valuable

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Kyoto is _________________ city in Japan.
It is not ________________ city in Japan.
the most attractive - the most large most attractive - largest the most attractive - the largest the attractivest - the largest
> 정답: the most attractive - the largest

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The most pretty place in Japan is Kyoto.
The earliest bus to the airport is at 5 a.m.
The Amazon River is the longest river in South America.
This chair is the most comfortable spot in the living room.
> 정답: The most pretty place in Japan is Kyoto.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Among these meals, the main dish was the most delicious.
Amy is the kindest student in her class.
My parents' room is the largest in the house.
This show is most entertaining to me.
> 정답: This show is most entertaining to me.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
The boy is the most __________________ person I've ever met. honest generous talkative polite
> 정답: polite

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
The girl is the _________est person I've ever met. great popular quiet tall
> 정답: popular

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy looks the happyest among these three people.
Tom is the most tallest student in his class.
The coach's explanation is the clearest to me.
The most large country in Asia is China.
> 정답: The coach's explanation is the clearest to me.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The firefighter is the most bravest of all.
Amy drives the most slowly on a rainy day.
Which is the larger country in the world?
Tom is the most clever kid in the science class.
> 정답: Amy drives the most slowly on a rainy day.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 선수는 그의 팀에서 가장 재능있는 선수이다.
The player is the most talented player on his team.
The player is most talented player on his team.
The player is the more talented player on his team.
The player is the talentedest player on his team.
> 정답: The player is the most talented player on his team.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 다섯 명 중 가장 활동적인 친구이다.
Tom is the most active friend of five.
Tom is the activest friend of five.
Tom is the more active friend of five.
Tom is the most activest friend of five.
> 정답: Tom is the most active friend of five.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그것은 내가 들었던 것 중에 가장 놀라운 소식이었다.
It was the most surprising news I have ever heard.
It was most surprising news I have ever heard.
It was the more surprising news I have ever heard.
It was the most surprisingest news I have ever heard.
> 정답: It was the most surprising news I have ever heard.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Math is the most interesting subject to me.
I took the shortest path to get here.
The biggest room in this house is my brother's.
Tom is known to be smartest student in the school.
> 정답: Tom is known to be smartest student in the school.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy visited the most famous library.
My little brother likes me the best.
His report was most clear to read and understand.
That was the worst decision he has ever made.
> 정답: His report was most clear to read and understand.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. My  brother  's  dream  is  to ride  fastest  bike  in  the  world. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: fastest → the fastest

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Among  us,  Amy  speaks  Korean the  most  well. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: most well. → best

---

**17.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
이 영화제는 한국에서 가장 인기 있는 행사이다.
This film festival is ___________________________________________.
the most popular event in Korea the popularest event in Korea most popular event in Korea the most popular event of Korea
> 정답: the most popular event in Korea

---

**18.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
가장 일찍 일어나는 새가 벌레를 잡는다. _______________________________ catches the worm.
The earliest bird The earlier bird The most early bird More early bird
> 정답: The earliest bird

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
My family decided to adopt a cat.
We went to an animal shelter.
There were many cats.
I liked the most cutest one.
But, my mom chose the smallest cat.
We brought the cat home and provided the most cozy home.
> 정답: the cutest, the smallest, the coziest

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
I have exams tomorrow.
I feel math is the most difficult subject of all the subjects.
Therefore, I study math the hardest .
I don't have to study science much, because it is easiest one for me.
If I pass all the exams, my mom will buy me the latest phone.
And she will also take me to the famousest restaurant in the town.
> 정답: the most difficult, the hardest, the easiest, the most famous
